abilities.name: 슬로스타트
abilities.description: 공격과 스피드가 잠시 동안 절반이 된다.

flavorTexts.text: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.
The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.
